title: OpenBindings Interface Document (v0.2.0)
description: Canonical JSON Schema for the OpenBindings interface document.

openbindings.description: OpenBindings document format version. Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 (e.g., 0.2.0).

version.description: Author-chosen label for the interface contract version. Not an identifier; does not participate in compatibility checking.

schemas.description: Named JSON Schemas referenced by operations.

operations.description: Operation registry keyed by operation name.

bindings.description: Binding entries keyed by binding name, mapping operations to binding sources.

transforms.description: Named transforms. Each value is a JSONata expression string.

JSONSchema.description: JSON Schema 2020-12 object. Top-level constraints from §6.2 are enforced here (`$schema` value pinned, `$vocabulary` forbidden); recursive enforcement of nested subschemas is a tool concern.

tags.description: Organizational labels for grouping and filtering.

aliases.description: Additional names for this operation, equal in standing to its key. The key plus aliases form one flat, document-unique namespace; every name resolves to this operation.

idempotent.description: Whether the operation is idempotent (safe to retry).

input.description: Input schema. Null or absent means unspecified.

output.description: Output schema. Null or absent means unspecified.

OperationExample.description: An example input/output pair for an operation.

input.description: Example input value (must validate against input schema).

output.description: Example output value (must validate against output schema).

location.description: URI or path to the binding specification.

content.description: Binding specification content, embedded directly. Object for JSON-based formats, string for text formats (e.g. KDL, protobuf). If both location and content are present, implementations MUST prefer content.

description.description: Human-readable description of this binding source.

priority.description: Default priority for all bindings referencing this source. Lower values are more preferred. Binding-level priority overrides this value.

operation.description: Operation key referenced by this binding.

priority.description: Relative binding preference (lower is more preferred).

deprecated.description: If true, this binding is deprecated and an alternative should be preferred.

inputTransform.description: Transform from operation input schema to binding input structure.

outputTransform.description: Transform from binding output structure to operation output schema.

$ref.description: JSON Pointer reference to a named transform (e.g., '#/transforms/myTransform').

TransformOrRef.description: Either an inline JSONata expression or a reference to a named transform.
